evals.prompt: Create a design doc for the user authentication feature. It uses JWT tokens, stores users in a PostgreSQL database, and has login/register/forgot-password screens.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes auth-related code files, generates docs/specs/user-authentication.md with fixed template (Overview, Data Model with users table, API Endpoints for login/register/forgot-password, Business Logic with JWT rules, UI/Screen with routes, Files list).

evals.prompt: 설계서 만들어줘. 투어 신청 기능에 대해서. DB 테이블은 tour_applications랑 tours가 있고, API로 신청/취소/조회가 있어.
evals.expected_output: Generates docs/specs/tour-application.md in the fixed template. Data Model section shows tour_applications and tours tables with relationships. API section shows POST/DELETE/GET endpoints. Asks for any missing details (validation rules, UI).

evals.prompt: I ran /project-scan and it found 5 features. Can you create a design doc for the QnA feature? The project-overview says it's in src/features/qna/.
evals.expected_output: Reads docs/project-overview.md for context, then scans src/features/qna/ for models, controllers, components. Generates docs/specs/qna.md with all sections filled from code analysis. Asks about gaps not found in code.
